response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 15+ years of engineering experience, solid testing/TDD background, and developer-tooling exposure through MCP frameworks, test runners (Trial), and assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts). However, the resume shows no formal people-management experience — no direct reports, no performance reviews conducted, no team leadership role explicitly held. The JD requires 2 years of people management and 3 years of technical leadership, and while technical leadership is plausibly demonstrated, the explicit people-management gap is disqualifying for a Level II Manager role. Also lacks mobile-platform ecosystem depth (some iOS/Apple TV work, but not at the scale implied by the JD).
strengths: 15+ years of software development across diverse stacks, well above the 8-year minimum
Developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure experience: built Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, MCP code generators, CI/CD setups
Track record of teaching/mentoring via workshops, dojos, and courses (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Web Internals)
concerns: No explicit people-management experience — no evidence of direct reports, 1:1s, or performance management
Mobile-platform ecosystem exposure is limited to a single Apple TV/iOS stint a decade ago
Career trajectory is IC-focused (Staff/Senior Developer titles); no Engineering Manager or Team Lead role listed
